TRIAL RESET TO DEC-29-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-10-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. (PLAINTIFF USED SC-150 FORM INSTEAD OF DECLARATION FORM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIESSING, SONIA (C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIESSING, SONIA (C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALDONADO, ADOLFO $3,830.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO, ADOLFO
